sections.content:
World model: Player is 4x3 (4 rows, 3 cols) at cols 30-32. Box is 4x4 at cols 32-35. Player needs to be 3x4 to match box width. Initial player was 3x4. Player shape may depend on movement direction.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Player at 40-43, 30-32 (4x3)
# Box at 36-39, 32-35 (4x4)
# Need player at cols 32-35 with 4-col width
# Try RIGHT to shift right and potentially change shape

result = action(['RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])
print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Green at rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], px={n['pixels']}")

# Check ascii to see player shape
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nPlayer region:")
for i in range(39, 45):
    row_str = lines[i] if i < len(lines) else ""
    crop = row_str[28:40] if len(row_str) >= 40 else row_str[28:]
    print(f"  row {i}: '{crop}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
